The Impact of CBIO+

Global Achievements of CBIO & Care Groups

Evidence of transformative health outcomes across Bolivia, Guatemala, Kenya, and Mozambique.

Breakthroughs in Rural Guatemala
Substantial Mortality Declines

The CBIO model achieved results where previous agency efforts had failed.

  • 54% reduction in under-5 mortality
  • 67% reduction in maternal mortality
  • Significant improvements in childhood nutrition across the rural highlands.

1987 National Success in Bolivia
Coverage Breakthrough in Montero and Northern Altiplano

Child mortality in Montero

  • Reduced to levels lower than the US average.
  • Child survival intervention coverage surged 50% across Cochabamba Valley households

Impact in Rural Kenya and Liberia

Kenya

Achieved some of the highest reductions documented globally:

  • 65% reduction in under-5 mortality
  • 70% reduction in maternal mortality

Liberia

Rapid scale-up of evidence-based interventions led to an estimated 63% reduction in under-5 mortality
